llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI arm available: developers who adopted Copilot
llm_extracted.notes: The paper reports only a qualitative comparison ('more than twice as frequently') without providing exact means, standard deviations, regression coefficients, or a precise percent change. The comparison is between developers who adopted Copilot vs. those who did not, which is an observational design with potential selection bias (adopters may differ systematically from non-adopters). No numeric values are extractable from the reported statistics. The phrase 'more than twice' suggests >100% increase but no exact number is given.
source_quotes: On average, Copilot users committed more than twice as frequently as non-users and made greater weekly contributions.
